name: Arrival of Beasts
short_description: Discover one of the hardest tower defense games with strategic elements, individual gameplay and challenging mechanics. Play together with your friends in co-op mode, create a team and compete with other players in the online ranking.
detailed_description:
Arrival of Beasts is a roguelite tower defense game that combines RTS and MOBA mechanics.

Build towers, control your hero directly on the battlefield, cast spells, and continuously develop your strategy. Fight alone or in co-op against increasingly powerful waves of monsters and create your perfect defense.

Control your hero directly on the battlefield

In Arrival of Beasts you actively control your hero. Build structures, repair towers, cast spells, and collect items. Your hero becomes a central part of your defense and opens up entirely new strategic possibilities.

Face massive waves of monsters

More than 44 unique monsters and 35 bosses attack your base.

Some monsters have special abilities, while others strike from a distance and can destroy your defenses. Only a well-planned strategy will allow you to survive the increasingly powerful waves.

Build your defenses

Construct more than 10 different towers and upgrade them up to level 8.

Each tower has unique properties and opens up new tactical possibilities. Combine different defensive strategies to defeat even the strongest monsters.

Customize your towers

Equip your towers with modules to grant them new effects.

Modules can be combined, upgraded, and further enhanced. This allows you to create powerful synergies and unique defensive strategies.

Play together in co-op

Create a team and fight together against the waves of monsters.

Support each other, share resources, and develop new strategies together to overcome the most challenging maps.

Develop your own playstyle

More than 50 unlockable abilities await you in the Skill Star.

Unlock new buildings, spells, and upgrades, and adapt your strategy to match your preferred playstyle. Prepare your base in the headquarters before heading into the next battle.

A campaign with endless replayability

The campaign features 6 worlds and 30 maps.

After completing it, you can start again through the Prestige system. The difficulty increases dynamically, forcing you to constantly develop new strategies.

Collect resources and develop your base

During a match you collect:

  • Gold

  • Rubonium

  • Amnestryth

These resources are used to purchase buildings, modules, and upgrades.

Prove your skill

Earn prestige points and climb the ranks.

Compare yourself with other players in the online leaderboards or take on the challenge of the endless map.

Dynamic seasons

The game is updated regularly and profiles are reset at certain intervals.

Statistics and achievements remain intact, allowing players to compete again every season.

In addition, an offline mode with permanent profiles is available.

Key Features

  • Roguelite tower defense with RTS and MOBA elements

  • Active hero control directly on the battlefield

  • More than 10 towers with unique abilities

  • Module system for powerful tower upgrades

  • More than 44 monsters and 35 bosses

  • 6 worlds and 30 campaign maps

  • Random maps and numerous co-op maps

  • Equipment items for your defense base

  • Prestige system with dynamic difficulty

  • Real-time co-op mode for 2–4 players

  • Skill Star with over 50 abilities

  • Endless map with leaderboard

  • Online and offline game modes

  • Events with mini games
